plugins.name: sdd-final-review
plugins.description: Multi-agent review pipeline: QA + Security in parallel, then Tech Leader as dispatcher. Saves versioned cycle reports and posts verdicts to GitHub PRs.
plugins.author: Rafael Ventura

plugins.name: sdd-docs
plugins.description: SDD authoring tools: /adr records Architecture Decision Records and /learning-lesson captures lessons learned. Auto-numbered files plus a maintained CLAUDE.md index — the same docs the Tech Leader reads during review.
plugins.author: Rafael Ventura
